inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 OCF $7.958B minus capital spending $2.260B divided by 808M diluted shares (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 filing-based owner cash; goodwill impairment $41M and elevated tax rate treated as non-recurring in narrative only

segments.label: Semiconductor Systems (WFE tools: deposition, etch, CMP, inspection, packaging)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 consolidated FCF allocated 73.3% by segment revenue share (10-K Note 15)
segments.notes: FY2025 rev $20.8B (+4.5% YoY); OI margin 35.5%; foundry/logic 67% of segment revenue

segments.label: Applied Global Services (spares, services, factory automation software)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 consolidated FCF allocated 22.5% by segment revenue share
segments.notes: FY2025 rev $6.4B (+2.6% YoY); recurring service mix; margin 28.1%

options.label: AI-driven wafer fab equipment backlog conversion
options.base_terminal_rationale: Backlog and AI WFE demand embedded in Semiconductor Systems growth path
options.notes: Contract liabilities $2.57B at Oct 2025; not separately terminal-valued

corporate_drag.notes: Corporate and Other operating income $882M offsets reconciling items; no extra drag row

bear.notes: WFE spending pause; China export restrictions deepen; memory capex cuts

base.notes: AI and advanced packaging sustain mid-single-digit WFE growth; AGS recurring mix stable

bull.notes: WFE supercycle on HBM, gate-all-around, and packaging; share gains vs peers

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Contract liabilities $2.57B; Semiconductor Systems growth 8% years 1-5

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: AI-driven WFE demand in Semiconductor Systems revenue and MD&A

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Standard equipment manufacturer balance sheet; no land/NAV misstatement

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
